data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The website is built to respond to various screen sizes and orientations, ensuring a seamless user experience.
data.technical_spec: CSS Media Queries, Flexbox, Grid Layout

data.title: Microservices
data.description: The site utilizes a microservices architecture for scalable and efficient service management.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Global CDN deployed to enhance content delivery speed and reduce latency.

data.title: Redundancy and Failover
data.description: Architectural features that ensure availability and reliability in case of system failures.
data.technical_spec: Load Balancers, Backup Servers, Active-Passive Failover

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Data is partitioned using sharding to enhance performance and manageability.
